description: fetch_latest_signals returns a 'formatted report' but no output structure (fields, types, section headings) is defined in the skill body
suggested_fix: Add a Markdown template showing the report sections (e.g., title, sentiment score, confidence, summary, sources list)

description: render_drawio_to_html output described only as 'a viewable HTML file'; no structure for the XML content or HTML wrapper is specified
suggested_fix: Add an example Draw.io XML snippet or describe the expected mxGraphModel root element structure

description: Section heading '### 1. Generate Draw.io Diagrams' appears twice in sequence (lines 14 and 17), wasting tokens
suggested_fix: Remove the first occurrence at line 14; keep only the expanded version at line 17

description: get_market_summary returns a 'formatted report of active prediction markets' with no defined fields or Markdown structure
suggested_fix: Add a sample report block showing market question, probability, and volume fields

description: get_base_forecast return type is List[KLinePoint] but KLinePoint fields (date, open, high, low, close, volume) are not defined in the SKILL.md body
suggested_fix: Add a KLinePoint schema table or example JSON to the SKILL.md body

description: 'subjectively adjust the numbers based on latest news/logic' — 'subjectively' provides no criteria for how the agent should adjust forecast values
suggested_fix: Replace with measurable guidance, e.g. 'If the news sentiment score is above 0.3, increase the close forecast by up to 2%; if below -0.3, decrease by up to 2%'

description: Section heading '### 1. Forecast Market Trends' appears twice (lines 14 and 16), wasting tokens
suggested_fix: Remove the first occurrence at line 14

description: The workflow generates 'professional financial reports' but no Markdown template, required sections, or output schema is defined
suggested_fix: Add a report template with required sections: Executive Summary, Signal Clusters, Chart Configs, Conclusion

description: Top-level heading '## Capabilities' appears twice (lines 13 and 15), wasting tokens
suggested_fix: Remove the first occurrence at line 13

description: search() return type is defined but aggregate_search() has no documented return type or structure
suggested_fix: Add return type annotation for aggregate_search(): 'Returns a Markdown string with one section per engine'

description: 'if the local tool is insufficient' — no accuracy threshold or failure criterion is defined for when to switch from FinBERT to LLM analysis
suggested_fix: Replace with a concrete criterion, e.g. 'If confidence < 0.6 or if the text is longer than 512 tokens, use the LLM prompt instead'

description: Top-level heading '## Capabilities' appears twice (lines 13 and 15)
suggested_fix: Remove the first occurrence at line 13

description: Output is described only as 'Updated Signal' with no schema; confidence, intensity, and status fields are not defined in the SKILL.md body
suggested_fix: Add an InvestmentSignal schema table: {thesis, status: Strengthened|Weakened|Falsified|Unchanged, confidence: 0.0-1.0, intensity: 0.0-1.0}

description: 'Use alphaear-search and alphaear-stock skills to gather the necessary data' — 'necessary' is undefined without specifying which data points are required
suggested_fix: List required inputs explicitly: ticker code, price history (N days), and latest news items (M items)

description: Section heading '### 1. Track Signal Evolution' appears twice (lines 14 and 17)
suggested_fix: Remove the first occurrence at line 14

description: 'Set Appropriate Degrees of Freedom' — 'Appropriate' provides no measurable criteria for selecting constraint level
suggested_fix: Replace with the three-tier table already described in the body: fragile/deterministic ops = low freedom, heuristic decisions = high freedom

description: 'For simple edits, modify the XML directly' — 'simple' is undefined without specifying edit scope or complexity threshold
suggested_fix: Replace with a concrete criterion, e.g. 'For edits touching fewer than 3 XML elements, modify the XML directly'

description: Code example imports KronosPredictorUtility from 'scripts.utils.kronos_predictor' but the file is at scripts/kronos_predictor.py (not scripts/utils/); raises ModuleNotFoundError at runtime
suggested_fix: Change import to 'from scripts.kronos_predictor import KronosPredictorUtility'

description: torch.load called without weights_only=True; pickle deserialization of an untrusted .pt file can execute arbitrary code
suggested_fix: Add weights_only=True parameter; handle TypeError for torch < 1.13 with an explicit version check rather than a broad except clause

description: Identical to predictor finding #1 — torch.load without weights_only=True in a duplicated evaluation script
suggested_fix: Same as predictor finding: add weights_only=True

description: Identical to predictor finding #1 — torch.load without weights_only=True in a duplicated evaluation script
suggested_fix: Same as predictor finding: add weights_only=True

description: Fallback path at line 83 drops weights_only=True when it raises TypeError/RuntimeError/AttributeError, silently bypassing the pickle safety guard
suggested_fix: Narrow the except to TypeError only (for old torch versions), and log a security warning when the fallback path is taken; consider failing closed instead

description: Outbound HTTP GET to https://newsnow.busiyi.world — a third-party Chinese aggregation service not under the repo owner's control; compromise of this host can inject malicious content into the agent's context
suggested_fix: Document the third-party dependency; add explicit SSLError handling and content-length limits on the response to prevent oversized payloads

description: ast.literal_eval applied to strings extracted from external API responses; safer than eval but processes untrusted input — a crafted response could trigger MemoryError or expose unexpected Python literals
suggested_fix: Add a content-length guard before calling literal_eval (e.g. raise if len(content) > 10000) to prevent MemoryError on adversarially large payloads

description: SKILL.md instructs the agent to use alphaear-search and alphaear-stock skills but neither is declared as a dependency; if either skill is absent the workflow silently degrades
suggested_fix: Add a Dependencies or Prerequisites section listing required co-installed skills

description: evaluation.py, training.py, json_utils.py, and database_manager.py are physically copied across alphaear-predictor, alphaear-signal-tracker, and alphaear-reporter; security fixes must be applied to three independent copies
suggested_fix: Extract shared utilities into a common skills/alphaear-common/ directory and reference from each skill
